logs.message: FiapOnSmartCity depends on Oracle.EntityFrameworkCore (>= 8.21.0) but Oracle.EntityFrameworkCore 8.21.0 was not found. An approximate best match of Oracle.EntityFrameworkCore 8.21.121 was resolved.
